nasb.text: For by one offering He has perfected for all time those who are sanctified.

esv.text: For by a single offering he has perfected for all time those who are being sanctified.

cnv.text: 因為他獻上了一次的祭，就使那些成聖的人永遠得到完全。

ccb.text: 祂凭自己的一次牺牲，使那些得以圣洁的人永远纯全。

csbs.text: 事实上，他藉着一个供物，使那些被分别为圣的人永远得以完全。
